subject: Feature: Permission mode toggle in TUI
description:
Add toggle command to switch between AllowedTools (automated) and interactive modes.

REQUIREMENT: User wants ability to enable "allow all" mode for automated sessions, but use interactive mode normally.

Design:
- New command: `/permissions auto` or `/permissions interactive`
- Show current mode in status bar
- Mode persists for session (or until toggled)
- In auto mode: AllowedTools set, no prompts
- In interactive mode: AllowedTools empty, handle prompts

Files:
- internal/tui/claude/commands.go (new command)
- internal/tui/claude/panel.go (state tracking)
- cmd/goyoke/main.go (read initial mode from flag or config)

Deliverable:
- `/permissions` command implementation
- Status bar indicator
- Mode switching logic
- Config file support (optional)

Acceptance:
- [ ] `/permissions auto` enables AllowedTools mode
- [ ] `/permissions interactive` disables AllowedTools
- [ ] Current mode shown in status bar or help
- [ ] Mode can be set via CLI flag on startup
- [ ] Mode switching works without restart
